meta.generator: Claude Design Engineer — AI SEO Dashboard

designTokens.name: semantics
designTokens.description: Figma-compatible token set. Map these to your Figma Variable Collection named 'semantics'.

Atom/Icon.description: Lucide icon wrapper. Used across all components.

Atom/Button.description: Interactive button element. Maps to components/ui/button.tsx

Atom/Input.description: Text input field. Maps to components/ui/input.tsx

Atom/Badge.description: Priority/status label pill. Used in Molecule/InsightCard

Atom/ProgressBar.description: Linear progress bar used in Molecule/StatCard

Atom/ProgressRing.description: Circular optimization score indicator used in Organism/CitationsTable

Molecule/LogoBadge.description: App logo area in sidebar header

Molecule/UserAvatar.description: User initials avatar at sidebar footer

Molecule/SearchInput.description: Search field with left-aligned icon prefix

Molecule/DateRangeButton.description: Date range selector button in Header

Molecule/NotificationBell.description: Bell icon button with badge count

Molecule/StatCard.description: Single KPI metric card. 4 instances in a row on desktop.

Molecule/InsightCard.description: AI strategic insight card. 3 per row on desktop.

Molecule/CitationRow.description: Desktop table row for citations. Inside Organism/CitationsTable.

Molecule/CitationCard.description: Mobile card variant of a citation row

Molecule/FilterSelect.description: Label + Select dropdown combo. Used in Organism/FilterBar

Molecule/BulkActionBar.description: Fixed floating bar shown when rows are selected (SearchVisibility page)

Organism/Sidebar.description: Fixed left navigation rail (desktop) + bottom bar (mobile)

Organism/Header.description: Top sticky header for the Dashboard page

children.text: Track your AI search visibility and performance

Organism/SearchVisibilityHeader.description: Top sticky header for the Search Visibility page (back-nav variant)

autoLayout.figmaNote: Use CSS Grid 4-column equivalent. On Figma: Auto Layout horizontal, each card set to Fill.

Organism/StrategicInsights.description: AI-generated insight cards section header + 3-column card grid

Organism/TrendsChart.description: Area chart card showing 12-month visibility trends

children.text: Monthly performance with AI event markers

children.name: Organism/TrendsChart/ChartArea
children.figmaNote: Render as a static area chart frame. Use Recharts-style gradient fills: aiDiscovery=violet-500@40%→0%, organicSearch=emerald-500@30%→0%, citations=blue-400@30%→0%

Organism/CitationsTable.description: AI citations data table with sorting, selection, and review actions

Organism/FilterBar.description: Filter controls card on SearchVisibility page

children.figmaNote: Horizontal auto layout, 4 equal-width cards, gap 16px
Vertical auto layout: section header + 3-col card grid
Top 5 rows only, no selection column, 'View all' header action
All rows, selection column enabled, citation count + selected count in header action
Fixed overlay — show as separate frame anchored to viewport bottom-center. Visible only when rows are selected.

step1_variables.title: Variables 설정
instructions: Figma 좌측 패널 → Assets → Variables → Create new collection 이름을 'semantics'로 설정
designTokens.color 하위 모든 항목을 Color Variable로 등록
Tokens Studio 플러그인 사용 시: 이 JSON의 designTokens 섹션을 직접 Import 가능
Builder.io 사용 시: CSS Variable 이름(figmaVariableName 필드)이 자동 매핑됨

step2_atoms.title: Atom 컴포넌트 제작
instructions: 각 Atom을 독립 Component로 제작 후 Variants로 상태 관리
색상값은 반드시 등록된 Variable에서 연결 (hex 직접 입력 금지)
Auto Layout 속성은 각 컴포넌트의 autoLayout 필드 참조

step3_molecules.title: Molecule 조합
instructions: Atom 컴포넌트를 Detach 없이 Instance로 배치
Auto Layout Gap/Padding 값은 spacing 토큰에서 참조
Interactive Component 기능으로 hover/active/selected 상태 연결

step4_organisms.title: Organism 및 Page 조립
instructions: Sidebar는 Fixed 포지션 컴포넌트로 별도 레이어에 배치
Organism 간 gap은 항상 spacing[6](24px) 사용
